sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id Int32, vector Tuple(Float64, Float64));
SELECT id, L2Normalize((-vector.1, -vector.2)) AS normalized_vector FROM test_vectors;
SELECT id, L2Normalize((vector.1, vector.2)) AS normalized_pos_vector, L2Normalize((-vector.1, -vector.2)) FROM test_vectors WHERE normalized_vector.1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, L2Normalize((vector.1, vector.2)) AS norm_vector FROM test_vectors WHERE L2Normalize(vector) != (1.0, 0.0) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_vectors WHERE vector.1 > 5);

SELECT AVG(scalar_distance) FROM (SELECT id, L2Normalize((vector.1, vector.2)) AS normalized_vector, vector.1 * -1 AS scalar_distance FROM test_vectors GROUP BY vector.1, vector.2 HAVING normalized_vector.1 > 0.7);
SELECT t1.id, L2Normalize((-t1.vector.1, -t2.vector.2)) AS combined_norm FROM test_vectors t1 JOIN test_vectors t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.vector.1 IS NOT NULL OR t2.vector.2 IS NULL;
WITH (SELECT L2Normalize((NULL, 4)) AS norm_value) AS subquery SELECT id, norm_value FROM test_vectors WHERE vector.1 + norm_value IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE normalized_results AS SELECT id, L2Normalize(vector) FROM test_vectors WHERE L2Normalize(vector) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_results AS SELECT id, L2Normalize((vector.1, vector.2)) AS norm_vector FROM test_vectors WHERE vector.1 + vector.2 > 10;
INSERT INTO temp_results SELECT id, L2Normalize((-vector.1, vector.2)) FROM test_vectors WHERE id % 2 = 0;
